name: Crabmeat Mousse
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 oz Can Alaskan king crab meat, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in cold water to soften.
2. Heat the mushroom soup until hot.
3. Stir the gelatin into the hot soup, ensuring it is fully dissolved.
4. Add the cream cheese and mayonnaise. Beat until smooth.
5. Mix in the celery, crab meat, onion, and Worcestershire sauce.
6. Pour the mixture into a mold and chill.
7. Serve with club crackers.
